headline: Earn $400 after completing direct deposit and account activity requirements.
requiredActions: Receive one qualifying payroll direct deposit within 60 days.
Complete at least 10 debit transactions in the first 90 days.
notes: Confirm monthly maintenance fee waivers before applying.

headline: Earn $250 by depositing fresh funds and maintaining the qualifying balance.
requiredActions: Deposit at least $10,000 in new money within 30 days.
Maintain qualifying balance through the bonus payout date.
